title: Stelis pileata
taxonomy: Stelis pileata is a species of orchid in the genus Stelis. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Stelis is further classified under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cranichideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is one of the largest subfamilies of orchids and includes over 15,000 species. Stelis pileata is a member of this diverse and widespread group of flowering plants.

intro: Stelis pileata is a species of orchid native to Central and South America, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin conditions.
